description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden .v132_base job template with environment name gkevc_132/$REVIEW_REF_PREFIX$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA, URL https://gitlab${DOMAIN}, and variables DOMAIN, HOST_SUFFIX, VARIABLES_FILE, VCLUSTER_K8S_VERSION, and VCLUSTER_NAME. Add a create_review_v132 job in the review stage that extends .v132_base, uses the ${BUSYBOX_IMAGE} Docker image, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, starts the environment (auto‑stop in $REVIEW_APPS_AUTO_STOP_IN, on_stop stop_review_v132) and runs a single shell command: echo "Configuring gkevc_132/$REVIEW_REF_PREFIX$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA to automatically stop in $REVIEW_APPS_AUTO_STOP_IN.". Include an external component that adds an e2e-test-v132 job in the qa-report stage, but only when the pipeline source is "pipeline" or "parent_pipeline" (never on gitlab.com). Define qa_v132 and qa_v132_manual_full_suite jobs that extend .qa_branch and .v132_base, depend on the review jobs, set TEST_SUITE variables, and run in the QA stage (the manual full‑suite job runs in parallel 7). Add qa_v132_full_suite_manual_trigger with a script echo "The job will trigger Full E2E suite against GKE132 vcluster", and stop_review_v132 that stops the review environment, both extending their respective templates.
